skill_loop.deepening: finished the in-flight dense-storage benchmark slice before starting the next production optimization pass

target.hotspot_basis: frankenjax-mcqr.30 identifies large F64 tensor reduction as still paying the Vec<Literal> data-model cost; the benchmark mirrors add_64k for the reduction side.

lever.name: large F64 reduce-sum benchmark coverage
lever.description: Add a Criterion row that evaluates ReduceSum over a 64k F64 vector so future dense-storage reduction work has a reproducible profile target.

baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-reduce-sum64k-bench cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- eval/reduce_sum_64k_f64 --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1

score.note: Benchmark-only bead; no production optimization score claimed.

isomorphism_proof.ordering_preserved: Yes. The production ReduceSum evaluator and row-major fold order are unchanged.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking_unchanged: Yes. The benchmark introduces no tie-breaking logic.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Identical production path. The benchmark only calls the existing eval_primitive ReduceSum path.
isomorphism_proof.errors_preserved: Function arity, dtype, shape, and error behavior are unchanged because only the benchmark harness changed.

validation.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-reduce-sum64k-bench cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- eval/reduce_sum_64k_f64 --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1
validation.result: passed; eval/reduce_sum_64k_f64 time [259.73 us, 286.68 us, 304.46 us]

validation.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-reduce-sum64k-check cargo check -p fj-lax --benches
RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-reduce-sum64k-clippy cargo clippy -p fj-lax --benches --no-deps -- -D warnings

next_profile_target: Profile the dense F64 reduction storage path from this benchmark and keep only a single production lever with Score >= 2.0.
